title: EndpointConfig
description:
The JSON **Endpoint config** (ADR-0018): binds one Infra shape's logical
roles (alice, bob1, lb, b2bua) to concrete addresses, plus the agent recv
bound. Addresses are infra-specific, so a config names the Infra shape it
is for — `build` rejects a mismatch.

infraShape.description: The Infra shape these addresses bind (e.g. `fake-lsbc-b2bua`).

recvTimeoutMs.description: Per-`recv` wait bound handed to every agent (real clock needs a wide one).

transitDelayMs.description: One-hop simulated transit delay (fake only; coerced to ≥1ms).
